title: aspidium esquirolii
intro: Aspidium esquirolii, also known as the Chinese Aspidium fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the Aspidium genus. This plant is traditionally used in Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. Aspidium esquirolii is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, alleviating rheumatism, and treating respiratory issues. In herbal preparations, Aspidium esquirolii is often used in teas, infusions, and decoctions, as well as being dried and powdered for use in traditional Chinese medicine formulas.
